name_cn:
Chanel 23p Square
Size: 12.5x16x4.5(cm)
23p Enamel Heart Square is amazing. This is a soft, delicate fuzzy little cutie. The look is especially beautiful. Pink two-tone hearts, double C logo, and gem-shaped enamel decorations adorn the bag strap. ~ The combination of the enamel clasp and strap makes the Square adaptable to a wider range of styles. Even a plain shirt can make the whole outfit look striking. It is indeed a dream item for many sisters.
Style No. AS3782
